F

FlixelDefaultSoundHandler - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.teavm.audio
TeaVM/web implementation of FlixelSoundBackend.Factory that falls back to libGDX Gdx.audio for sound playback.
FlixelDefaultSoundHandler() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.teavm.audio.FlixelDefaultSoundHandler
 
FlixelTeaVMAlerter - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.teavm.alert
Web (TeaVM) implementation of FlixelAlerter using JavaScript's alert() function.
FlixelTeaVMAlerter() - Constructor for class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.teavm.alert.FlixelTeaVMAlerter
 
FlixelTeaVMLauncher - Class in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.teavm
Launches the web (TeaVM) version of a FlixelGDX game.

L

launch(FlixelGame) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.teavm.FlixelTeaVMLauncher
Launches the web version of the game in RELEASE mode with default configuration.
launch(FlixelGame, FlixelRuntimeMode) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.teavm.FlixelTeaVMLauncher
Launches the web version of the game with the given runtime mode and default configuration.
launch(FlixelGame, FlixelRuntimeMode, Consumer<WebApplicationConfiguration>) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.teavm.FlixelTeaVMLauncher
Launches the web version of the game with the given runtime mode and an optional configuration customizer.
